## 🌍 Environment

- **Browser/OS:** [e.g., Chrome on Windows 11]

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

<!-- How do we know the bug is fixed? -->

- [ ] **AC1:** Given [pre-condition], When [action], Then [bug no longer occurs]
- [ ] **AC2:** Regression testing: [related scenario still works]

---

## 📊 Complexity

**Estimated Score:** __ / 20

- Root cause known: [ ] Yes [ ] No
- Likely fix area: [backend/frontend/database]
- Impact: [# of users affected, critical path affected]

**Category:** [ ] SIMPLE (1-8) [ ] STANDARD (9-15) [ ] COMPLEX (16+)

---

## 🔗 Related Issues

<!-- Link to related stories or issues -->

- Relates to: #[issue number]
- Caused by: STORY-X (if known)

---

## ✨ Definition of Done

- [ ] Root cause identified
- [ ] Fix implemented
- [ ] Regression testing passed
- [ ] Test coverage adequate (85%+)
- [ ] No CRITICAL CodeRabbit issues
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] Verified on staging/production
